mapper.select: SELECT REQ_IDX, LOAN_SEQ, MEMBER_NAME, STORE_NAME, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE FROM BOOK_STORE_REQ WHERE REQ_IDX = #{req_idx}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_STORE_REQ WHERE 1=1
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_STORE_REQ WHERE LOAN_SEQ = #{loan_seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK_STORE_REQ SET loan_seq = #{loan_seq}, member_name = #{member_name}, store_name = #{store_name}, modify_id = #{add_id}, modify_date = sysdate WHERE req_idx = #{req_idx}
